business_ideas.idea: Luxury Airbnb portfolio with destination experiences, targeting affluent groups
Gel Blaster guns (gel pellet weapons) - D2C product with multi-million revenue
Mini katana/sword sales through organic viral content without paid ads
General contracting via subcontracting model without technical expertise
Alpha Paw dog and cat product business, pivoted to cat litter
Guy Mafia marketplace - buy from anonymous Twitter accounts, sell via community

predictions.text: Big companies don't need speed because they have distribution and size advantage
Planning becomes critical at scale 10-100M revenue, velocity trades for redundancy/predictability
Best ideas sound like bad ideas initially due to low competition and greenfield opportunity
